# Schema Reference

Benchmark on-disk schemas and version specifications.

## Benchmark versions

| Version | Dataset ID | Required case files | Optional case files |
|---------|------------|---------------------|---------------------|
| `v0.1` | `fsmrepairbench_v0` | `reference_fsm.json`, `faulty_fsm.json`, `bug_metadata.json`, `oracle_suite.json` | — |
| `v1.0` | `fsmrepairbench_v1` | `reference_fsm.json`, `faulty_fsm.json`, `bug_metadata.json`, `oracle_suite.json`, `case_metadata.json` | — |
| `v1.1` | `fsmrepairbench_v1` | `reference_fsm.json`, `faulty_fsm.json`, `bug_metadata.json`, `oracle_suite.json`, `case_metadata.json` | — |
| `v2.0` | `fsmrepairbench_v2` | `reference_fsm.json`, `faulty_fsm.json`, `bug_metadata.json`, `oracle_suite.json`, `case_metadata.json` | `requirements.json` |

## Dataset metadata fields

### `v0.1`

`dataset_id`, `seed`, `cases_dir`

### `v1.0`

`dataset_id`, `benchmark_version`, `seed`, `target_size`, `completed_cases`, `cases_dir`

### `v1.1`

`dataset_id`, `benchmark_version`, `seed`, `target_size`, `completed_cases`, `cases_dir`, `statistics`

### `v2.0`

`dataset_id`, `benchmark_version`, `schema_version`, `seed`, `target_size`, `completed_cases`, `cases_dir`, `statistics`


## Case metadata (`case_metadata.json`)

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `case_id` | string | Stable case identifier (`case_{index:06d}`) |
| `benchmark_version` | string | Schema version for the case |
| `reference_fsm_id` | string | Reference FSM identifier |
| `faulty_fsm_id` | string | Faulty FSM identifier |
| `complexity` | string | Synthetic complexity preset |
| `state_count` | integer | Reachable state count |
| `transition_count` | integer | Reachable transition count |
| `event_count` | integer | Event alphabet size |
| `mutation_operator` | string | Applied mutation operator |
| `difficulty_score` | float | Structural difficulty score (0–100) |
| `difficulty_category` | string | easy | medium | hard | expert |
| `difficulty` | object | Full difficulty metadata block |
| `oracle_coverage` | object | state/transition/event coverage ratios |
| `reference_bpr` | float | Reference FSM behavioural pass rate |
| `faulty_bpr` | float | Faulty FSM behavioural pass rate |
| `bpr_delta` | float | reference_bpr - faulty_bpr |
| `valid_reference` | boolean | Reference FSM passed validation |
| `valid_faulty` | boolean | Faulty FSM passed validation |

## Core JSON models

### `ExperimentConfig`

Module: `fsmrepairbench.experiments`

YAML experiment configuration.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `models` | `list[str | dict[str, Any]]` | yes | — |  |
| `cases_dir` | `Path` | yes | — |  |
| `iterations` | `int` | no | 3 |  |
| `temperature` | `float` | no | 0.0 |  |
| `output_dir` | `Path` | yes | — |  |
| `resume` | `bool` | no | True |  |
| `workers` | `int` | no | 4 |  |
| `checkpoint_interval` | `int` | no | 100 |  |
| `default_backend` | `ModelBackend` | no | ollama |  |

### `BugMetadata`

Module: `fsmrepairbench.models`

Metadata describing an injected bug used in a benchmark instance.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `bug_id` | `str` | yes | — |  |
| `reference_fsm_id` | `str` | yes | — |  |
| `faulty_fsm_id` | `str` | yes | — |  |
| `mutation_operator` | `str` | yes | — |  |
| `changed_transition_id` | `str | None` | no | None |  |
| `description` | `str` | yes | — |  |
| `seed` | `int` | yes | — |  |

### `FSM`

Module: `fsmrepairbench.models`

Behavioural finite-state machine definition.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `str` | yes | — |  |
| `name` | `str` | yes | — |  |
| `description` | `str` | no | '' |  |
| `states` | `list[fsmrepairbench.models.State]` | yes | — |  |
| `initial_state` | `str` | yes | — |  |
| `events` | `list[str]` | yes | — |  |
| `transitions` | `list[fsmrepairbench.models.Transition]` | no | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `variables` | `dict[str, str]` | no | PydanticUndefined |  |

### `OracleScenario`

Module: `fsmrepairbench.models`

Named sequence of oracle steps.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `str` | yes | — |  |
| `description` | `str` | no | '' |  |
| `steps` | `list[fsmrepairbench.models.OracleStep]` | no | PydanticUndefined |  |

### `OracleStep`

Module: `fsmrepairbench.models`

One step in an oracle scenario: apply an event and expect a state.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `event` | `str` | yes | — |  |
| `expected_state` | `str` | yes | — |  |
| `guard` | `str | None` | no | None |  |

### `OracleSuite`

Module: `fsmrepairbench.models`

Collection of oracle scenarios for validating FSM behaviour.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `str` | yes | — |  |
| `fsm_id` | `str | None` | no | None |  |
| `scenarios` | `list[fsmrepairbench.models.OracleScenario]` | no | PydanticUndefined |  |

### `State`

Module: `fsmrepairbench.models`

A single state in a finite-state machine.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `str` | yes | — |  |
| `state_output` | `str | None` | no | None |  |

### `Transition`

Module: `fsmrepairbench.models`

A directed edge triggered by an event.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | `str` | yes | — |  |
| `source` | `str` | yes | — |  |
| `event` | `str` | yes | — |  |
| `target` | `str` | yes | — |  |
| `guard` | `str | None` | no | None |  |
| `action` | `str | None` | no | None |  |
| `output` | `str | None` | no | None |  |
| `timeout` | `float | None` | no | None |  |
| `delay` | `float | None` | no | None |  |
| `requirements` | `list[str]` | no | PydanticUndefined |  |

### `FSMPatch`

Module: `fsmrepairbench.patch`

Patch describing repair operations for an FSM.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `patch_id` | `str` | yes | — |  |
| `target_fsm_id` | `str` | yes | — |  |
| `operations` | `list[Annotated[fsmrepairbench.patch.AddTransitionOperation | fsmrepairbench.patch.RemoveTransitionOperation | fsmrepairbench.patch.ReplaceTransitionSourceOperation | fsmrepairbench.patch.ReplaceTransitionTargetOperation | fsmrepairbench.patch.ReplaceTransitionEventOperation | fsmrepairbench.patch.ReplaceInitialStateOperation | fsmrepairbench.patch.ReplaceGuardOperation | fsmrepairbench.patch.ReplaceActionOperation, FieldInfo(annotation=NoneType, required=True, discriminator='op')]]` | no | PydanticUndefined |  |

## Validation

```bash
fsmrepairbench validate-fsm tests/fixtures/valid_fsm.json
fsmrepairbench validate-oracle tests/fixtures/valid_oracle.json
fsmrepairbench validate-dataset DATASET_DIR
fsmrepairbench benchmark-version DATASET_DIR
```
